reviews.comment:
El mejor lugar de la ruta para parar.

(Translated by Google)
The best place to stop along the route.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkOU1EaWhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar de parada en la ruta 2 camino a la Costa. Muy cómodo para sentarse al aire libre a almorzar o tomar unos mates. Baños limpios 💪y minisuper disponible para comprar algo. También cuenta con una parrilla.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent stop on Route 2 on the way to the coast. Very comfortable for sitting outside for lunch or some mate. Clean restrooms 💪 and a mini-market available for buying something. It also has a grill.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkNVB1Z2F3EAE

reviews.comment:
Es una excelente estación de servicio con un muy bien refrigerado local de YPF FULL

(Translated by Google)
It's an excellent service station with a very well-refrigerated YPF FULL store.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkaElpc05nEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente parada en la ruta 2, cuanta con mesas y silllas al aire libre, podes estar xon las mascotas, muchos arboles. Baños muy amplios, el drugstore bien completo. Es una parada casi obligatoria cuando volves de la costa

(Translated by Google)
Excellent stop on Route 2, with outdoor tables and chairs, pets allowed, and plenty of trees. Spacious restrooms and a well-stocked convenience store. It's practically a must-stop when returning from the coast.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkLUlxby1BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Ideal para la parada Intermedia entre MDQ y CABA. Cargar combustible y comer un rico choripan en el parque

(Translated by Google)
Ideal for a stopover between Mar del Plata and Buenos Aires. Fill up with gas and enjoy a delicious choripán in the park.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkLVBpNlRnEAE

reviews.comment:

La parrilla no tiene desperdicio

(Translated by Google)
A very nice place to stop.
The grill is a must.

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar como parador, con muchos lugares para disfrutar de un buen asado.

(Translated by Google)
A good place to stop, with many places to enjoy a good barbecue.

reviews.comment:
El ACA EXCELENTE,EL MUCHACHO DE LA GRUA 10 PUNTOS,AGRADECIDOS CON EL,NO NOS DEJARON TIRADOS DE MADRUGADA.

(Translated by Google)
The ACA was EXCELLENT, the tow truck driver was a 10/10, we are grateful to him, he didn't leave us stranded in the middle of the night.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
